# DualTime

**DualTime** by Atley LLC — local time in 12-hour and 24-hour formats, side by side.

| Resource | Link |
|----------|------|
| Live web | https://atleyllc.github.io/dualtime/ |
| Latest release | https://github.com/atleyllc/dualtime/releases/latest |
| Release workflow | [docs/RELEASE_WORKFLOW.md](../docs/RELEASE_WORKFLOW.md) |

Repository: `atleyllc/dualtime`. Releases use `DualTime-v*-beta.apk` artifacts.

Android package: `com.atleyllc.dualtime`
